subject: [PATCH v5 04/11] mm: zswap: add range lookup for large-folio swapin

reviews.author: Yosry Ahmed
reviews.summary: The reviewer questioned whether it was intentional to drop a warning in the case where zswap_is_present() returns true, and specifically asked about the folio_test_large() && zswap_is_present() case.
reviews.raw_body:
Is dropping the warning here intentional (for the folio_test_large() &&
zswap_is_present() case)?

2026-07-23.patch_summary: This patch adds a range lookup feature to the zswap compression algorithm, allowing it to handle large folios by scanning the covered range and checking if any slots are still in zswap. If no slot is found, it returns -ENOENT so the caller can read from the backing device. If any slot is present, it fails the large-folio read to prevent returning partially initialized data. The patch also introduces a new function `zswap_is_present` to enable PMD swap-entry consumers to make range decisions before attempting PMD-order swapin.
